thesis: This is a first-class euphoria-top short, not a flat. The Bull calls the mood constructive momentum, but all three experts read terminal greed: influencer attention spiked to euphoric FOMO (items tw-21, tw-30), narrative is the same recycled story everyone already owns (item rd-12), and flow is greedy on LATE chasers. That is a crowded, exhausted long - the marginal buyer is the influencer crowd and there is no one left to convince. The Bull's momentum IS the crowdedness. Three distinct sources carry the euphoria, so this is grounded.
key_points: influencer euphoric FOMO (items tw-21, tw-30) = terminal late crowd
narrative is recycled, already-owned story (item rd-12), not a fresh catalyst
flow greedy on late chasers = no marginal buyer left
three sources back the euphoria read - grounded, not lone-tweet
